title: Lava fishing
description: You can now use fishing rods to fish directly in lava!
body:
# 📜 Things you should know
This datapack is WORK IN PROGRESS. Expect to see up to 1-3 glitches
I will update this from time to time.
![fishing rod](https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/minecraft_gamepedia/images/7/7f/Fishing_Rod_JE2_BE2.png/revision/latest?cb=20200201063839)

# 📖 What is this about?
![Fishing in Lava](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5321aa6b61f1a4316e7ad59971e363629f8cc061.png)
Lava Fishing is a datapack that allows you to fish in lava, this can be done by any fishing rod and in any dimension. This datapack allows your childhood mod idea of fishing in lava to come true.

# 🪙 What are all the possible items you can get from lava fishing?

- 2 Magma Cream
- 4 Obsidian
- 1 Fire Res Potion
- Blaze
- 1 Cooked Cod
- Wither Skeleton
- 1 Blaze Rod
- 1 Ancient Debris
- 1 Wither Skull

![minecraft chest opening and closing](https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/minecraft_gamepedia/images/4/41/Chest.gif/revision/latest?cb=20191219163201)
